use_cases: Showcase featured images with smooth progressive blur transitions
Display hero content cards with overlaid text and visual hierarchy
Create gallery or portfolio item cards with depth effects
Build product showcase cards with immersive hover experiences
Design travel or lifestyle content cards with cinematic visual styling
ai_summary: A sophisticated image card component featuring progressive blur overlay with backdrop-filter effects, gradient masking, and smooth hover animations. The card includes image zoom on hover, shadow depth changes, and a glass-morphism blur effect that fades content from bottom to top. Built with Tailwind utility classes and Lucide icons for a modern, polished appearance suitable for media-rich interfaces.
